data.text:
The test file already exists and passes — committed in 3b0fefc1, present in current HEAD. The prior REVIEW:BLOCK was mistaken; the diff at base-rev `fea4f7db` already contains the test file (134 lines added in the merge). All ACs are satisfied:

- AC1: file at the specified path ✓
- AC2: `expect(await edges.count()).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)` ✓
- AC3: light-theme stroke + marker fill assert `rgb(75, 85, 99)` ✓
- AC4: toggles `html.dark`, asserts `rgb(184, 175, 156)` ✓
- AC5: `bun run test:e2e` passes locally (verified just now: `1 passed (17.9s)`)

Writing rationale and exiting without a new commit.

input.content:
Bead: ddx-7e7b12f0 — test(web): e2e regression check for doc graph edge color tokens

Status: All acceptance criteria are already satisfied at base-rev fea4f7db. No new
commit produced this attempt because there is nothing left to change.

Evidence:

- The test file exists at the exact required path:
  cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/graph/graph.e2e.ts
- It was added in commit 3b0fefc1 ("test(web): e2e regression check for doc graph
  edge color tokens [ddx-7e7b12f0]") and merged to main via e8cc76e8. Both are
  ancestors of the current base-rev fea4f7db, so the file is part of the working
  tree at the start of this attempt.
- Acceptance criteria walk-through against the committed file:
  AC1: file present at specified route directory — yes (path above).
  AC2: `expect(await edges.count()).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)` on `svg locator('line')`
       — graph.e2e.ts:100-102.
  AC3: light-theme stroke and arrow marker fill asserted to `rgb(75, 85, 99)` (#4B5563)
       via getComputedStyle — graph.e2e.ts:107-114.
  AC4: after `document.documentElement.classList.add('dark')`, both stroke and marker
       fill asserted to `rgb(184, 175, 156)` (#B8AF9C) — graph.e2e.ts:116-125. Pre-load
       cleanup is handled with `page.addInitScript` removing `dark` (lines 87-89).
  AC5: `bun run test:e2e <path>` was executed in this worktree against the existing
       file. Result: `1 passed (17.9s)`.

The prior REVIEW:BLOCK note ("Diff contains only an execution result.json artifact;
no graph.e2e.ts test file or fixture changes are present") appears to have been
generated against a different (empty) attempt artifact. The actual merged content
for this bead is intact.

Action taken: no code changes; this rationale file is the only artifact to commit
so the post-merge reviewer can see why no additional diff was produced.
